Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ApexPageInfo

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ApexPageInfo
public class ApexPageInfo extends SObject

Java class for ApexPageInfo complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ApexPageInfo">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ApexPageId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ApiVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsAvailableInTouch" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsShowHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="MasterLabel" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NameSpacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
